title: Commentary on Investments: As of March 31, 2026
content:
Total investments stood at $112.85 million as of March 31, 2026, reflecting a 2.0% increase from the previous year-end.

The portfolio remains heavily weighted toward available-for-sale debt securities, which total $110.21 million and represent virtually the entire investment base. These securities provide stable income generation while maintaining liquidity support within policy parameters.

Other investments totaled $356K and remain immaterial relative to the overall portfolio. The increase in investment balances during the period reflects reinvestment of excess cash flows, further strengthening the credit union's earning asset base without altering its conservative structure.

The investment maturity distribution remains well distributed across multiple time horizons, supporting effective liquidity management and interest rate risk control. The portfolio includes a mix of short-, intermediate-, and longer-term maturities, allowing flexibility in managing reinvestment opportunities as market conditions evolve.

Overall, the credit union's investment portfolio remains conservative, liquid, and aligned with policy guidelines. Management continues to emphasize capital preservation, stable yield generation, and prudent duration management while maintaining flexibility to respond to changing balance-sheet needs.
